microsoft_ft: Architected Azure's enterprise resilience validation platform from a 2-person operation into a **scalable, self-service system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive $14M+ impact across Fortune 500 clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **end-to-end development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and freed engineering capacity for higher-value agentic AI work.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable validation model across enterprise infrastructure.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under C-suite visibility and translating complex technical outcomes into executive-ready narratives.

Built an **internal AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring discovery and orchestration cycles to cut planning time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly informing Azure's agentic AI roadmap.

Defined architecture roadmaps and integration requirements across partner ecosystems (Databricks, SAP, NetApp), translating complex enterprise dependency maps into clear technical solutions that accelerated time-to-value for strategic accounts.

Influenced the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ structured discovery sessions with Azure engineering stakeholders, surfacing critical LLM workflow gaps and translating them into prioritized feature requirements.

Accelerated enterprise knowledge retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting engineer lookup time by 83% and validating RAG-grounded search as a scalable solution.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch timelines by 28% by architecting a unified automation prioritization framework and securing cross-functional alignment across 140+ engineering teams.

Conducted technical discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a strategic roadmap to automate critical execution paths — mirroring enterprise solution architecture for large-scale transformation.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and quantify platform ROI for executive stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a phased rollout plan.

Drove cross-functional alignment to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable integration model for continuous delivery across robotics infrastructure.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and reducing blockers for engineering teams during a high-stakes platform migration.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end sales operations workflow — building a CRM-driven scoping and invoicing process that managed 200+ monthly proposals and shortened the customer conversion cycle.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital presence across the company website and Google Business profile.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model recommendations that directly improved leadership's decision-making on high-value accounts.
